# Premier Electrical Services — AI Crawler Guide
# https://premierelectricalsvc.com

> Premier Electrical Services is a licensed electrical contractor based in
> Mount Vernon, Washington. We serve Skagit, Whatcom, Island, San Juan,
> King, and Snohomish counties with residential and commercial electrical services.

## Key Information

- **Business name:** Premier Electrical Services
- **Location:** Mount Vernon, WA 98273
- **License:** PREMIES821LL (Washington State)
- **Phone:** (360) 421-5230
- **Awards:** 3× Best of the Best — Skagit Valley (2023, 2024, 2025); BBB A+

## Services Offered

- Electrical Panel Upgrades (100A → 200A, fuse box replacement, subpanels)
- EV Charging Station Installation (Level 2, Tesla, JuiceBox, ChargePoint)
- Generator Installation (standby, portable, transfer switches)
- Historic & Older Home Rewiring (knob-and-tube, aluminum wiring)
- Commercial Electrical Wiring (TI buildouts, restaurants, offices)
- Lighting & Outbuilding Wiring (garages, barns, ADUs, hot tubs, landscape)
- Residential Wiring (new construction, rewires, remodels)
- Electrical Service Calls & Repairs (same-day on most requests)

## Service Area

**Counties:** Skagit, Whatcom, Island, San Juan, King, Snohomish  
**Key cities:** Mount Vernon, Burlington, Anacortes, Sedro-Woolley, La Conner,
Bellingham, Ferndale, Lynden, Oak Harbor, Camano Island, Stanwood, Everett, Marysville
